assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 2): Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF

Rigorous design. Patient-level split, equal per-label threshold optimization, fiscal-year subgroup analysis. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 2): Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF

Equal tuning conditions, document parity, sliding-window encoding for fair context handling. Design is sound.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 2): Long-Context Clinical LM vs. TF-IDF

The paired bootstrap significance test with single primary comparison is appropriate. MDC monitoring for drift. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
